channel.title: ultrasonic irradiation; nickel nanoparticles; 4-hydroxy coumarin;pyrazolone; dimedone; pyran on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in ultrasonic irradiation; nickel nanoparticles; 4-hydroxy coumarin;pyrazolone; dimedone; pyran on LMI

item.title: Synthesis Of Pyran Derivatives Under Ultrasound Irradiation Using Ninanoparticles As Reusable Catalysts In Aqueous Medium
